note.en: I welcome collaboration on preventive cardiology, LBBB risk stratification, digital twin modeling, and international partnerships in medical education.
note.uz: Profilaktik kardilogiya, digital twin modellashtirish hamda tibbiy ta'limda xalqaro hamkorlik bo'yicha takliflarni mamnuniyat bilan qabul qilaman.

role.en: Dean, Faculty of Medicine — Kimyo International University in Tashkent, Samarkand Branch
role.uz: Dekan, Tibbiyot fakulteti — Kimyo International University in Tashkent, Samarqand filiali

institution.en: School of Medicine, Kimyo International University in Tashkent — Samarkand Branch, Samarkand, Uzbekistan
institution.uz: Tibbiyot maktabi, Kimyo International University in Tashkent — Samarqand filiali, Samarqand, Oʻzbekiston.

title.en: MD, MSc — Cardiologist · PhD candidate in Digital Medicine and Cardiology
title.uz: MD, MSc — Kardiolog · Raqamli tibbiyot va Kardiologiya bo'yicha PhD tadqiqotchisi

lede.en: I work at the intersection of clinical electrophysiology and predictive cardiology: how the surface ECG and left atrial remodeling can be used to anticipate left ventricular dysfunction in patients with cardiac pacing and left bundle branch block — and how cardiac digital twin modeling can make that prediction patient-specific.
lede.uz: Men klinik elektrofiziologiya va prognostik kardiologiya kesishmasida ishlayman: yurak stimulyatsiyasi va chap oyoqcha blokadasi (LBBB) bo'lgan bemorlarda yuzaki EKG va chap bo'lmacha remodellanishi orqali chap qorincha disfunksiyasini oldindan bashorat qilish — hamda cardiac digital twin modellashtirish bu bashoratni har bir bemorga xoslashtirish.

intro.en: As Dean I hold academic and administrative responsibility for the faculty's medical education directions: curriculum architecture, quality assurance, staff development, and preparation for national and international accreditation.
intro.uz: Dekan sifatida fakultetning tibbiy ta'lim yo'nalishlari uchun akademik va ma'muriy javobgarlikni zimmamda olganman: o'quv dasturi arxitekturasi, sifat kafolati, kadrlar rivoji hamda milliy va xalqaro akkreditatsiyaga tayyorgarlik.

title.uz: O'quv dasturi dizayni va sifat kafolati

text.en: Module and course organisation, development of teaching materials, and alignment of programmes with accreditation standards. Certified expert of the Eurasian Centre for Accreditation and Quality Assurance (Almaty, 2021).
text.uz: Modul va kurslarni tashkil etish, o'quv materiallarini ishlab chiqish hamda dasturlarni akkreditatsiya standartlariga moslashtirish. Akkreditatsiya va sifat kafolati Yevrosiyo markazining sertifikatlangan eksperti (Olmaota, 2021).

text.en: A pedagogical research line asking whether immersive VR improves student performance. Begun under COVID-19 conditions, it is now a standing part of how we teach clinical skills; published in the Journal of Cardiorespiratory Research and presented at ESCI.
text.uz: Immersiv VR talabalar natijasini yaxshilaydimi degan pedagogik tadqiqot yo'nalishi. COVID-19 sharoitida boshlangan, hozir klinik ko'nikmalarni o'qitishning doimiy qismi; Journal of Cardiorespiratory Research'da nashr etilgan va ESCI'da taqdim etilgan.

text.en: Supervision of students and junior researchers in cardiology, with an emphasis on bringing young Uzbek authors into internationally indexed journals and conferences.
text.uz: Kardiologiya bo'yicha talabalar va yosh tadqiqotchilarga rahbarlik; O'zbekistonlik yosh mualliflarni xalqaro indekslangan jurnal va konferensiyalarga olib chiqishga urg'u.

text.en: Advocacy for research capacity and international partnership in Uzbek medical education — including work with Osmosis / Raise the Line and continuing ties with Chungnam National University, South Korea.
text.uz: O'zbek tibbiy ta'limida tadqiqot salohiyati va xalqaro hamkorlikni targ'ib qilish — jumladan Osmosis / Raise the Line bilan ish va Chungnam milliy universiteti (Janubiy Koreya) bilan davomiy aloqalar.

about.en: I am a cardiologist and academic leader based in Samarkand, Uzbekistan. Since August 2024, I have served as Dean of the Faculty of Medicine at Kimyo International University in Tashkent, Samarkand Branch, where I am responsible for the design, quality and accreditation-readiness of the medical curriculum. Before that, I spent three years as an Assistant Professor at Samarkand State Medical University while practicing as a cardiologist at the Samarkand Regional Branch of the Republican Specialized Scientific & Practical Medical Center of Cardiology.
about.uz: 2024-yil avgust oyidan buyon Toshkent shahridagi Kimyo xalqaro universiteti Samarqand filialida tibbiyot fakulteti dekani lavozimida faoliyat yuritib kelmoqdaman.  Bu yerda ta'lim yo'nalishi rahbari sifatida, tibbiyotda o‘quv dasturlarini ishlab chiqish, ularning sifati va akkreditatsiyaga tayyorligi uchun mas’ulman. Bungacha uch yil davomida Samarqand davlat tibbiyot universitetida professor-o'qituvchi lavozimida ishlaganman va Respublika ixtisoslashtirilgan kardiologiya ilmiy-amaliy tibbiyot markazi Samarqand viloyati filialida kardiolog-shifokor bo‘lib faoliyat yuritganman.

about.en: My training has been international. I completed an MSc in Medicine (Cardiology) at Chungnam National University in Daejeon, South Korea, including a clinical fellowship in interventional cardiology in the catheterisation laboratory of Chungnam National University Hospital, supported by three consecutive research scholarships. I am also a certified expert in accreditation and quality assurance, trained at the Eurasian Centre for Accreditation and Quality Assurance in Higher Education and Health Care in Almaty.
about.uz: Tayyorgarligim xalqaro bo'lgan. Janubiy Koreyaning Dejon shahridagi Chungnam milliy universitetida Tibbiyot (Kardiologiya) bo'yicha magistratura (MSc) ni tamomladim, jumladan Chungnam National University Hospital katetеrizatsiya laboratoriyasida interventsion kardiologiya bo'yicha klinik fellowship o'tadim; buni ketma-ket uchta ilmiy stipendiya qo'llab-quvvatladi. Shuningdek, Olmaotadagi Oliy ta'lim va sog'liqni saqlashda akkreditatsiya va sifat kafolati Yevrosiyo markazida tayyorlangan sertifikatlangan akkreditatsiya va sifat kafolati eksperti hisoblanaman.

about.en: I am currently completing a PhD (Falsafa doktori, specialty 14.00.06) at Samarkand State Medical University on LAVI-based prognostic modeling in patients with left bundle branch block, integrated with cardiac digital twin technology.
about.uz: Hozirda Samarqand davlat tibbiyot universitetida PhD (Falsafa doktori, 14.00.06 ixtisosligi) ni yakunlamoqdaman — mavzu: chap oyoqcha blokadasi (LBBB) bo'lgan bemorlarda LAVI asosidagi prognostik modellashtirish, cardiac digital twin texnologiyasi bilan integratsiyada.

where.uz: Kimyo International University in Tashkent — Samarqand filiali

detail.uz: O'quv materiallari va dasturlarni ishlab chiqish; modul va kurs tashkilotchisi; talabalarga rahbarlik.

detail.en: Diagnosis and treatment of cardiovascular disease; echocardiography and diagnostic testing.
detail.uz: Yurak-qon tomir kasalliklari diagnostikasi va davolash; exokardiografiya va diagnostik tekshiruvlar.

what.uz: Umumiy amaliyot shifokori va tez tibbiy yordam shifokori

detail.en: Emergency assessment and treatment; routine and prophylactic examination.
detail.uz: Shoshilinch baholash va davolash; profilaktik ko'riklar.

detail.en: Dissertation: LAVI-based prognostic modeling in LBBB patients integrating cardiac digital twin technology. Supervisor: F. N. Toshentayeva.
detail.uz: Dissertatsiya: LBBB bemorlarida cardiac digital twin texnologiyasi bilan integratsiyalashgan LAVI asosidagi prognostik modellashtirish. Rahbar: F. N. Toshentayeva.

detail.en: Catheterisation laboratory; procedural and interventional cardiology.
detail.uz: Katetеrizatsiya laboratoriyasi; protsedural va interventsion kardiologiya.

where.en: Chungnam National University, Daejeon, South Korea
where.uz: Chungnam milliy universiteti, Dejon, Janubiy Koreya

detail.uz: Aritmiyalar, chap oyoqcha blokadasi va ikkilamchi profilaktika qo'llanmalari bo'yicha tadqiqot.

detail.en: The Eurasian Center for Accreditation and Quality Assurance in Higher Education and Health Care (ECAQA) is an independent international accreditation agency specializing in quality assurance and external evaluation for medical and healthcare education programs, as well as general higher education institutions.
detail.uz: Eurasian Centre for Accreditation and Quality Assurance in Higher Education and Health Care (ECAQA) — oliy ta'lim va sog'liqni saqlash sohasida ta'lim sifatini baholash va akkreditatsiyadan o'tkazishga ixtisoslashgan xalqaro darajadagi mustaqil agentlikdir.

detail.en: In 2018, I graduated from Samarkand State Medical University, majoring in General Medicine, with the qualification of Medical Doctor.
detail.uz: 2018-yilda Samarqand davlat tibbiyot universitetida davolash ishi yo'nalishini tamomladim

detail.en: I have been awarded the Research Encouragement Scholarship at Chungnam National University.
detail.uz: Men Chungnam Milliy Universitetidagi ilmiy faoliyatim uchun tadqiqotni rag'batlantirish stipendiyasini qo'lga kiritdim.

where.en: Samsung Dream Scholarship Foundation, South Korea
where.uz: Samsung Dream Scholarship jamg'armasi, Janubiy Koreya

detail.en: The Global Hope Scholarship is a prestigious international financial aid program funded by the Samsung Dream Scholarship Foundation in South Korea, designed to support talented students from developing nations pursuing higher education.
detail.uz:
Global Hope Scholarship — Janubiy Koreyadagi Samsung Dream Scholarship Foundation (Samsung Orzu Stipendiyasi Jamg'armasi) tomonidan rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlardan kelgan iqtidorli talabalarni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun ajratiladigan nufuzli xalqaro stipendiya dasturidir.

Dasturning asosiy maqsadi — moliyaviy yordamga muhtoj, lekin akademik ko'rsatkichlari yuqori bo'lgan talabalarni o'z mamlakatlari va global jamiyat rivojiga hissa qo meyoridagi yetakchi mutassislar qilib tayyorlashdir.

detail.en: CNU has a grant and scholarship system for Master's degree and PhD students
detail.uz: CNU muhandislik, tabiiy fanlar, tibbiyot va IT yo'nalishlarida o'qiydigan magistr va doktorantlar uchun maxsus ilmiy grant va stipendiyalr taqdim etadi

value.en: Echocardiography (2D/3D with strain); 12-lead ECG interpretation; interventional cardiology procedures.
value.uz: Exokardiografiya (2D/3D, strain bilan); 12 tarmoqli EKG talqini; interventsion kardiologiya protseduralari.

value.en: Statistical analysis (SPSS); medical data analysis and reporting; cardiac digital twin modeling.
value.uz: Statistik tahlil (SPSS); tibbiy ma'lumotlar tahlili va hisobot; cardiac digital twin modellashtirish.

value.en: Curriculum design; module organisation; conference presentation (talks, posters, workshops).
value.uz: O'quv dasturi dizayni; modul tashkil etish; konferensiya taqdimotlari (ma'ruza, poster, seminar).

value.en: Uzbek (native) · English (full professional, IELTS 7.0) · Russian (full professional) · Korean (intermediate, TOPIK 4).
value.uz: O'zbek (ona tili) · Ingliz (to'liq professional, IELTS 7.0) · Rus (to'liq professional) · Koreys (o'rta, TOPIK 4).

text.en: Two case reports on multimodal imaging — parotid adenoid cystic carcinoma, and non-small cell lung carcinoma — published in the Journal of Medical Imaging.
text.uz: Multimodal tasvirlash bo'yicha ikki klinik holat hisoboti — quloqoldi bezi adenoid kistoz karsinomasi va mayda hujayrali bo'lmagan o'pka karsinomasi — Journal of Medical Imaging'da nashr etildi.

text.en: Two abstracts accepted at the ESCI Annual Scientific Meeting: alternatives to iodinated contrast in patients with chronic kidney disease, and recurrent WPW syndrome with multiple accessory pathways.
text.uz: ESCI yillik ilmiy anjumaniga ikki tezis qabul qilindi: surunkali buyrak kasalligi bemorlarida yodli kontrastga muqobillar va ko'p qo'shimcha yo'lli takroriy WPW sindromi.

text.en: Appointed Dean of the Faculty of Medicine, Kimyo International University in Tashkent — Samarkand Branch.
text.uz: Kimyo International University in Tashkent Samarqand filiali Tibbiyot fakulteti dekani etib tayinlandi.

text.en: Abstract on the prognostic implications of electrocardiography after permanent pacemaker insertion published in the European Journal of Clinical Investigation (Wiley).
text.uz: Doimiy elektrokardiostimulyator o'rnatilgandan keyin EKG'ning prognostik ahamiyati bo'yicha tezis European Journal of Clinical Investigation'da (Wiley) nashr etildi.

text.en: Featured with Mahzuna Nasretdinova on Osmosis Raise the Line, on research and international collaboration in Uzbek medical education.
text.uz: Mahzuna Nasretdinova bilan birga Osmosis Raise the Line'da O'zbek tibbiy ta'limida tadqiqot va xalqaro hamkorlik mavzusida ishtirok etdi.

text.en: Faculty Training Program hosted by Soonchunhyang University in South Korea.
text.uz: Soonchunhyang Universitetida tibbiyot va tibbiy ta'lim yo'nalishida malaka oshirish dasturi

title.en: LAVI-based prognostic modeling in left bundle branch block
title.uz: Chap oyoqcha blokadasida LAVI asosidagi prognostik modellashtirish

description.en: Developing a left atrial volume index (LAVI)-based model to risk-stratify patients with LBBB, integrated with cardiac digital twin technology. Core of the doctoral dissertation.
description.uz: LBBB bemorlarini risk bo'yicha tabaqalashtirish uchun chap bo'lmacha hajm indeksi (LAVI) asosidagi modelni ishlab chiqish, cardiac digital twin texnologiyasi bilan integratsiyada. Doktorlik dissertatsiyasining o'zagi.

partners.en: Samarkand State Medical University · Supervisor: F. N. Toshentayeva
partners.uz: Samarqand davlat tibbiyot universiteti · Rahbar: F. N. Toshentayeva

title.en: ECG prediction of LV dysfunction after cardiac pacing
title.uz: Yurak stimulyatsiyasidan keyin CHQ disfunksiyasini EKG orqali bashorat qilish

description.en: Studying which electrocardiographic patterns after permanent pacemaker implantation predict a fall in left ventricular ejection fraction. Presented at the ESCI Annual Scientific Meeting (2024) and in earlier conference work (2021).
description.uz: Doimiy elektrokardiostimulyator implantatsiyasidan keyin qaysi EKG patternlari chap qorincha otilish fraksiyasining pasayishini bashorat qilishini o'rganish. ESCI yillik ilmiy anjumanida (2024) va oldingi konferensiya ishida (2021) taqdim etilgan.

partners.en: Samarkand State Medical University; RSSPMC of Cardiology, Samarkand Branch
partners.uz: Samarqand davlat tibbiyot universiteti; RIKIATM kardiologiya, Samarqand filiali

description.en: A pedagogical research line evaluating whether immersive VR improves medical students' performance in cardiology. Published in the Journal of Cardiorespiratory Research (2022) and presented at ESCI (2024).
description.uz: Immersiv VR tibbiyot talabalarining kardiologiyadagi natijalarini yaxshilaydimi degan pedagogik tadqiqot yo'nalishi. Journal of Cardiorespiratory Research'da (2022) nashr etilgan va ESCI'da (2024) taqdim etilgan.

title.en: Multimodal & molecular imaging for predictive medicine
title.uz: Prognostik tibbiyot uchun multimodal va molekulyar tasvirlash

description.en: A series of case reports and reviews on multimodal and molecular imaging and its role in predictive medicine, in collaboration with the Chungnam National University research group.
description.uz: Multimodal va molekulyar tasvirlash hamda uning prognostik tibbiyotdagi o'rni bo'yicha klinik holat hisobotlari va sharhlar turkumi, Chungnam milliy universiteti tadqiqot guruhi bilan hamkorlikda.

partners.en: Chungnam National University group; Journal of Medical Imaging (ScholarGen)
partners.uz: Chungnam milliy universiteti guruhi; Journal of Medical Imaging (ScholarGen)

title.en: Biocompatible implantable antenna for wireless cardiac data
title.uz: Yurak ma'lumotlarini simsiz uzatish uchun biouyg'un implant antenna

description.en: Interdisciplinary work on a biocompatible dual-band implantable antenna with SAR-reduction techniques for the wireless transmission of cardiac and neural diagnostic data.
description.uz: Yurak va nerv diagnostika ma'lumotlarini simsiz uzatish uchun SAR'ni kamaytirish usullariga ega biouyg'un ikki diapazonli implant antenna bo'yicha fanlararo ish.

partners.en: National Journal of Antennas and Propagation (2025)
partners.uz: National Journal of Antennas and Propagation (2025)

title.en: ECG prediction of LV dysfunction in cardiac pacing
title.uz: Yurak stimulyatsiyasida CHQ disfunksiyasini EKG orqali bashorat qilish

text.en: Identifying which electrocardiographic patterns after permanent pacemaker implantation predict a decline in left ventricular ejection fraction — so that patients can be moved early to physiological or resynchronisation pacing.
text.uz: Doimiy elektrokardiostimulyator implantatsiyasidan keyin qaysi EKG patternlari chap qorincha otilish fraksiyasining pasayishini bashorat qilishini aniqlash — bemorlarni erta bosqichda fiziologik yoki resinxronizatsiya stimulyatsiyasiga o'tkazish uchun.

title.en: LAVI as a prognostic marker in LBBB

text.en: The left atrial volume index as an integrative marker of chronic filling pressure, and its value in risk-stratifying patients with left bundle branch block. This is the core of my doctoral work.
text.uz: Chap bo'lmacha hajm indeksi (LAVI) surunkali to'lish bosimining integrativ markeri sifatida va uning LBBB bemorlarini risk bo'yicha tabaqalashtirishdagi ahamiyati. Bu — doktorlik ishimning o'zagi.

text.en: Patient-specific computational models that combine imaging, ECG and clinical data — moving prognosis from the population average to the individual patient.
text.uz: Tasvirlash, EKG va klinik ma'lumotlarni birlashtiruvchi bemorga xos hisoblash modellari — prognozni populyatsiya o'rtachasidan alohida bemorga ko'chirish.

text.en: Clinical electrophysiology: accessory pathway syndromes, conduction block, and the interpretation of complex paced and pre-excited electrocardiograms.
text.uz: Klinik elektrofiziologiya: qo'shimcha o'tkazuvchi yo'l sindromlari, o'tkazuvchanlik blokadasi hamda murakkab stimulyatsiyalangan va pre-eksitatsiyali EKG'larni talqin qilish.

text.en: Guideline-directed secondary prevention in coronary artery disease, and the influence of metabolic syndrome on cardiovascular outcomes.
text.uz: Koronar arteriya kasalligida qo'llanmalarga asoslangan ikkilamchi profilaktika hamda metabolik sindromning yurak-qon tomir oqibatlariga ta'siri.

text.en: Multimodal and molecular imaging for predictive medicine, and biocompatible implantable antennas for the wireless transmission of cardiac diagnostic data.
text.uz: Prognostik tibbiyot uchun multimodal va molekulyar tasvirlash hamda yurak diagnostika ma'lumotlarini simsiz uzatish uchun biouyg'un implant antennalar.
